export const smoothScrollTo=function(elementId){let offset=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:80;const element=document.getElementById(elementId);if(!element){console.warn(`Element with id "${elementId}" not found`);return;}const startPosition=window.pageYOffset;const targetPosition=element.getBoundingClientRect().top+window.pageYOffset-offset;const distance=targetPosition-startPosition;const duration=500;// ms
let startTime=null;const easeInOutQuad=t=>{return t<0.5?2*t*t:-1+(4-2*t)*t;};const animation=currentTime=>{if(!startTime)startTime=currentTime;const timeElapsed=currentTime-startTime;const progress=Math.min(timeElapsed/duration,1);const easeProgress=easeInOutQuad(progress);window.scrollTo(0,startPosition+distance*easeProgress);if(timeElapsed<duration){requestAnimationFrame(animation);}};requestAnimationFrame(animation);};export const useSmoothScroll=()=>{const scrollTo=function(elementId){let offset=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:80;smoothScrollTo(elementId,offset);};const scrollToTop=()=>{const startPosition=window.pageYOffset;const duration=500;let startTime=null;const easeInOutQuad=t=>{return t<0.5?2*t*t:-1+(4-2*t)*t;};const animation=currentTime=>{if(!startTime)startTime=currentTime;const timeElapsed=currentTime-startTime;const progress=Math.min(timeElapsed/duration,1);const easeProgress=easeInOutQuad(progress);window.scrollTo(0,startPosition*(1-easeProgress));if(timeElapsed<duration){requestAnimationFrame(animation);}};requestAnimationFrame(animation);};return{scrollTo,scrollToTop};};export default smoothScrollTo;
